name: Channi Tiny Home Plan - 16x32 Modern Backyard ADU | DIY Tiny House Plans (448 Sq Ft)
open_features: Modern minimalist architecture built for backyard ADU use, flexible living spaces, and efficient land utilization-now with enhanced width for more livable layouts.
Clean lines, standard framing, and intuitive building methods make Channi ideal for both first-time builders and experienced DIYers.
Well-placed doors and balanced windows maximize natural light, airflow, and functional interior zoning.
Horizontal wood siding, sleek trim details, and a single-pitch lean-to roof create a modern-rustic aesthetic with timeless curb appeal.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Channi Tiny Home - a generously sized 16x32 modern living and working space designed for efficiency, comfort, and clean architectural simplicity. With its expanded width and extended length, Channi delivers exceptional interior flexibility while maintaining a sleek, contemporary footprint ideal for backyard ADUs and modern outdoor living. Showcasing a streamlined single-slope roof, warm horizontal wood siding, and crisp contemporary lines, Channi...
